title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
